## Feature description
A clear and concise description of what the feature request is.

## Which role(s) would benefit
- [ ] Student
- [ ] Teacher
- [ ] Librarian
- [ ] Admin

## Why it should be free to implement
Describe why this addition does not require database changes or backend alterations (e.g. client-only filtering, new style theme tokens, etc.).

## Additional context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
